narrative:
Recovery Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 872 registered voters, with 47.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 46.8 percentage points.
